query:
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, c.name AS customerName
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Kawana%' OR c.name LIKE '%Aspley%' OR c.name LIKE '%Emergency Medicine%'
ORDER BY c.name, s.externalId;
